title: Claymation Character
summary: A tiny clay character bounces happily and waves - charming stop-motion feel.
prompt: A handcrafted claymation character: a chubby little clay creature with oversized eyes and stubby arms stands on a wooden tabletop. It bounces excitedly on its feet, waves a tiny arm at the camera, and tilts its head with a goofy smile. Visible fingerprints in the clay, subtle stop-motion stutter, warm tabletop-studio lighting. Charming Aardman-style craft.
